cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:plugin-scaffold jira-assistant A Jira integration plugin for Claude Code
cases.expect: forks the claude-plugin-builder agent and scaffolds a complete plugin with plugin.json, marketplace.json, directory structure, CLAUDE.md, and README

cases.prompt: scaffold a new Claude Code plugin called pdf-tools --minimal
cases.expect: forks the claude-plugin-builder agent and produces only manifests plus CLAUDE.md and README with no component stubs

cases.prompt: build a claude code plugin with custom agents and commands
cases.expect: forks the claude-plugin-builder agent and scaffolds the plugin structure including agents/ and commands/ directories
